feature: configurable scoring thresholds + context-aware finding prioritization (#370, #371)
summary: Two scoring improvements shipped together: (1) dampening_k, breadth_cap, and grade_bands are now tunable via the new scoring: section in drift.yaml; feedback_blend_alpha is available when calibration is enabled. (2) Findings are now ranked by signal context weight, stack depth, and recency so the most actionable items surface first.
design_goals: Allow per-project scoring tuning without code changes
Preserve existing defaults when no scoring: section is present
Context-aware prioritization of findings by actionability
No precision/recall regression from reordering alone
non_goals: No breaking changes to output schema

self_analysis.notes: Reordering of findings does not affect P/R metrics; scoring thresholds preserve defaults.
